zh.lifeSummary: 當King of Halich Danilo Romanovich Rurik於1201年出生在波蘭維爾可波爾斯吉卡利斯時，他的父親Roman “the Grand” Mstislavich Rurik48歲，母親Duchess of Owrutsch Predslawa Rjurikowna41歲。他於1218年與Anna Mistislavna結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1264年在烏克蘭Івано-ФранківськаГалицький район加利享年63歲，埋葬在波蘭盧貝爾斯吉武姆斯吉武姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当King of Halich Danilo Romanovich Rurik于1201年出生在波兰維爾可波爾斯吉卡利斯时，他的父亲Roman “the Grand” Mstislavich Rurik48岁，母亲Duchess of Owrutsch Predslawa Rjurikowna41岁。他于1218年与Anna Mistislavna结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1264年在乌克兰Івано-ФранківськаГалицький район加利享年63岁，埋葬在波兰盧貝爾斯吉武姆斯吉武姆。

nameMeanings.name: Rurik
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Slovak (mainly Jurík): from a pet form of the personal name Juraj, an equivalent of Latin Georgius (see George ).

variants.name: George
meanings: English, Welsh, French, and Romanian: from the personal name George, Latin Georgius, Greek Geōrgios, from an adjectival form, geōrgios ‘rustic’, of Greek geōrgos ‘farmer’. This became established as a personal name in classical times through its association with the fashion for pastoral poetry. Its popularity in western Europe increased at the time of the Crusades, which brought greater contact with the Orthodox Church, in which several Christian martyrs and saints of this name are venerated, in particular a saint believed to have been martyred at Nicomedia in AD 303, who, however, is at best a shadowy figure historically. Nevertheless, by the end of the Middle Ages Saint George had become associated with an unhistorical legend of dragon-slaying exploits, which caught the popular imagination throughout Europe, and he came to be considered the patron saint of England among other places. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages, e.g. German Georg , Assyrian/Chaldean Giwargis, Gewargis , or Georgis , and Albanian Gjergji , and also their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Greek Georgiadis , Georgopoulos , Hatzigeorgiou ‘George the Pilgrim’, and Papageorgiou , Romanian Georgescu or Gheorghescu, Serbian Djordjevic . The name George is also found among Christians in southern India (compare Geevarghese and Varghese ), but since South Indians traditionally do not have hereditary surnames, the southern Indian name was in most cases registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US.
Native American (e.g. Navajo): adoption of the English personal name George (see 1 above) as a surname.

variants.name: Jurick
meanings: Germanized or Americanized form of Slovak Jurík (see Jurik ).
Americanized form of Croatian Jurić, Slovenian and Slovak Jurič (see Juric ). Compare Yurick .

nameMeanings.name: Danilo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Russian, Macedonian, Serbian, and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic); Belorussian (standard transliteration/spelling Danilaŭ): patronymic from the personal name Danilo, a vernacular form of Daniel (Russian Daniil). It is formed with the Slavic possessive suffix -ov.

variants.name: Daniel
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘God is my judge’ in Hebrew), borne by the prophet whose story is told in the Book of Daniel. He was an Israelite slave of the Assyrian king Nebuchadnezzar, who obtained great favour through his skill in interpreting dreams and the ‘writing on the wall’ at the feast held by Nebuchadnezzar's son Belshazzar. His enemies managed to get him cast into a lions' den, but he was saved by God. This was a favourite tale in the Middle Ages, often represented in miracle plays. The name has been perennially popular among English speakers since the 16th century and has been particularly favoured since the 1980s.

en.lifeSummary: When King of Halich Danilo Romanovich Rurik was born in 1201, in Kalisz, Greater Poland, Poland, his father, Roman “the Grand” Mstislavich Rurik, was 48 and his mother, Duchess of Owrutsch Predslawa Rjurikowna, was 41. He married Anna Mistislavna in 1218. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. He died in 1264, in Galich, Halych, Ivano-Frankivsk, Ukraine, at the age of 63, and was buried in Chełm, Chełm, Lublin, Poland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque King of Halich Danilo Romanovich Rurik est né en 1201, à Kalisz, wielkopolskie, Pologne, son père, Roman “the Grand” Mstislavich Rurik, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Duchess of Owrutsch Predslawa Rjurikowna, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Anna Mistislavna en 1218. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1264, à Galich, Halytsʹkyy Rayon, Ivano-Frankivsk, Ukraine, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Chełm, Chełmski, lubelskie, Pologne.

de.lifeSummary: Als King of Halich Danilo Romanovich Rurik 1201 in Kalisz, Woiwodschaft Großpolen, Polen geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roman “the Grand” Mstislavich Rurik 48 und seine Mutter Duchess of Owrutsch Predslawa Rjurikowna 41. Er hat 1218 Anna Mistislavna geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1264 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Galich, Halytsʹkyy Rayon, Ivano-Frankivsk, Ukraine und wurde in Chełm, Chełmski, lubelskie, Polen begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando King of Halich Danilo Romanovich Rurik è nato il nel 1201 nel Kalisz, wielkopolskie, Polonia, il suo padre, Roman “the Grand” Mstislavich Rurik, aveva 48 anni e il suo madre, Duchess of Owrutsch Predslawa Rjurikowna, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Anna Mistislavna nel 1218. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1264, nel Galich, Halytsʹkyy Rayon, Ivano-Frankivsk, Ucraina, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Chełm, Chełmski, lubelskie, Polonia.

ko.lifeSummary: King of Halich Danilo Romanovich Rurik(이)가 1201년 폴란드 위코포스키 캘리스즈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roman “the Grand” Mstislavich Rurik(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Duchess of Owrutsch Predslawa Rjurikowna(은)는 41세였다. 그는 1218년 Anna Mistislavna(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1264년 우크라이나 Івано-Франківська Галицький район 갈리치에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 폴란드 루벨스키 체l스키 체l에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando King of Halich Danilo Romanovich Rurik nasceu em 1201, em Kalisz, wielkopolskie, Polônia, seu pai, Roman “the Grand” Mstislavich Rurik, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Duchess of Owrutsch Predslawa Rjurikowna, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Anna Mistislavna em 1218. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1264, em Galich, Halytsʹkyy Rayon, Ivano-Frankivsk, Ucrânia, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Chełm, Chełmski, lubelskie, Polônia.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда King of Halich Danilo Romanovich Rurik родился в 1201 г. в местности калисз, виелкополски, Польша, его отцу по имени Roman “the Grand” Mstislavich Rurik было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Duchess of Owrutsch Predslawa Rjurikowna, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Mistislavna в 1218 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1264 г. в местности галич, Галицкий район, Ивано-Франковская, Украина в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности Холм, Холмський, Люблінське, Польша.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando King of Halich Danilo Romanovich Rurik nació en 1201, en Kalisz, wielkopolskie, Polonia, su papá, Roman “the Grand” Mstislavich Rurik, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Duchess of Owrutsch Predslawa Rjurikowna, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Anna Mistislavna en 1218. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1264, en Galich, Halytsʹkyy Rayon, Ivano-Frankivsk, Ucrania, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Chełm, Chełmski, lubelskie, Polonia.
